text_block_list.text:
Falcon? She isn't here. She left about one hour and thirty-five minutes
ago.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A day has passed since I recommended that Smart Falcon run on dirt
courses. Wanting to talk to her again, I've come to her dorm in search
of her.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My apologies for the late introduction. I'm Eishin Flash, Smart
Falcon's roommate.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Are you... Falcon's trainer? If it's urgent, contacting her smartphone is
the surest way to get a hold of her.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Although I can't guarantee that she'll check her phone. She might've
turned it off by now.
choice_data_list: Do you know where she went?
Do you know where she went?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka was amazing! I knew she was good, but I didn't think
she'd win by that much!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad we caught the whole thing in person! I can't wait to see
Suzuka take center stage for the winning concert!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My search for Smart Falcon leads me to the racetrack. The stadium's
filled to the brim with excited onlookers waiting for the winning
concert to begin.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! This is so exciting! ☆ Go, Suzuka! You can do it! I believe in
you!

text_block_list.name: Wild Crowd
text_block_list.text: YEAHHH! SUZUKAAA!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The concert begins. Everyone's eyes are glued to the incredible
performance that follows.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Silence Suzuka's voice isn't the loudest, the joy in it is
palpable—a joy shared by all her cheering fans.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh! Sniffle... Suzukaaa! You're the best! Watching you run makes me feel like I can do anything! I'll keep working hard, just like you do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, I find myself captivated like everyone else. Then my
eyes drift over to Smart Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes are also locked onto the stage, but something about her
gaze seems... different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the concert ends, I look for Smart Falcon, but she's already
gone. It's possible that she left for the dorm, but I suspect otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hi, everybody! I'm Falco! That was a great concert, wasn't it? ☆
Suzuka never fails to impress!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But don't go anywhere yet! I'll give you a fantastic performance too!
All I ask is that you remember my name! ☆ With that said, let's get
started! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My suspicions are confirmed when I spot Smart Falcon performing by
the riverside. Maybe this is just a plan to attract an audience still
riding their concert high, but...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Hey, she looks like an Umamusume too. Do you know her?

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Nah, never seen her. Maybe she hasn't made her debut yet? Anyway,
wasn't Suzuka's concert great? My favorite part was when she—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... How was that, everybody?! It's my dream to one day perform on a major stage! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: One day...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I... wonder when that'll be...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well, it's not like anybody here would know. Time to head—oh.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I... I've always loved idols a lot, ever since I was little. They're so cute,
and they smile so bright that they light up any stage.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I kept telling myself that I'd be an idol one day too. But that dream
changed just a little when I saw my first race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I went because I'd heard that Umamusume sing and dance just like
idols do, in addition to race. It was such a strange concept to me that
I had to find out more.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Seeing everybody running their hardest, I couldn't take my eyes off
the racetrack—not even for a second!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But what was even more exciting was the concert that came after!
When the spotlight hit them, everyone shone twice as bright as they
did on the racetrack!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I thought to myself, "That's what I want!" Umamusume shine their
brightest while running, and their winning concerts are the cherry on
top!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's when I decided to become an Umadol! I wanted to light up the
world like they did—no, even more than that! I wanted to become a
shining beacon of hope!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just like... the way Suzuka did today, taking first place and
performing center stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a shining star just like her! I want to be an Umadol that
moves the hearts of all who watch me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I keep working hard, one day my dream'll come true. Or at least,
that's what I keep telling myself...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I don't mean to say that I feel like giving up! Let me make it
clear—I still dream of becoming a world-class Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's just that... that dream feels so distant today. Suzuka was so
amazing, it's hard to think I could follow in her footsteps... Haha...
ha...
choice_data_list:
You have a shot at winning if you run in dirt
races.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I know... I actually knew as much from the start.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was admitted here, my teachers have all suggested that I
run on dirt courses. They say it suits me better.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't become a top Umadol running in dirt races. You know
what I mean, right?
choice_data_list: Because they aren't as popular as turf races...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. If I choose to run in dirt races, I'll never perform on a big
stage like Suzuka did today.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The fans like turf races because that's where all the superstars are. It's
only fair that the runners who win there are considered the best.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I could run on dirt courses, win races, and be the star of those
winning concerts.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But... that's not what I want! I don't want to be the lead of just any concert! My dream is to become a top Umadol and make it big on the greatest stages!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to give up on my dreams just 'cause I'm "better suited" for
something else! There's no room for compromise! I can't do it! I won't
do it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You probably think I'm being ridiculous. But I don't care! I'll keep
racing on turf courses in hopes of one day achieving my dream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand her reason for wanting to run in turf races. I also agree
that it's important to dream big, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to think that dirt racing is some kind of second-rate
category, and that's just not right. In order to help her realize that...
choice_data_list:
Would your teachers be okay with you missing
class tomorrow?

Would your teachers be okay with you missing
class tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Oh, uh... As long as you're the one asking for permission, they'd
probably be okay with it, but... why?
choice_data_list: I want to take you to a race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay. I still don't get why, but I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But in exchange, you have to do one thing for me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well, you see...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'd like it if you called me Falco, not Falcon! ☆ It sounds cuter that
way!
